title: Chore: Add CORS support
original_text: Added CORS support for API. Implemented CORS middleware. Configured allowed origins. Configured allowed methods and headers. Implemented CORS preflight handling. Added CORS error handling. Updated API documentation. Result: CORS support operational.
expected_subject: chore(api): add CORS support for API
expected_command: git commit -m "chore(api): add CORS support for API"
